content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(monolithic_for_initial_release)
C: team_size_6 ∧ part_time_devops ∧ 4_months_to_ship ∧ PostgreSQL_database
H: simplicity_for_early_delivery ∧ less_devops_complexity ∧ easier_for_small_team ⇒ prefer(monolithic_for_initial_release)
P: focus_on_core_features → minimize_handoff
R: ! scalability_in_future ∧ ! potential_database_split ∧ ! technical_debt
A: "monolith_initially,_scale_later"

[AUDIT]
Choose monolithic_for_initial_release under team_size_6, part_time_devops and keep the path to future decomposition open.
